Title: Category - Facet Filtering
Preconditions: Category with faceted products exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category with facets on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Verify facet panel is visible in sidebar
[ACT] Click on a facet value (e.g., Brand)
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify products are filtered; result count updates
[ACT] Apply an additional facet value from another group
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify combined AND filtering — result set narrower
Assertions:
[DOM] Facet panel visible with multiple facet groups
[DOM] Clicking a facet value filters the product list
[MATH] Multiple facets combine with AND logic — result count <= each individual filter count
[DOM] Result count label updates after each filter action
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner >5s after filter click; facet panel not rendering; result count unchanged after filter; console TypeError

Title: Category - Price Range Filter
Preconditions: Products with varying prices exist in category
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Locate price range filter (slider or min/max inputs)
[ACT] Set minimum price value
[ACT] Set maximum price value
[ACT] Apply or confirm the price range filter
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify all displayed products fall within the specified range
Assertions:
[DOM] Price range slider or input fields present
[MATH] All displayed product prices are within the set min/max range
[DOM] Products outside price range are not shown
[DOM] Result count updates to reflect filtered set
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on price filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Price filter controls not rendering; products outside range still visible; result count unchanged; console TypeError

Title: Category - Clear Filters

Title: Filters - Browser Back/Forward Navigation

[WAIT] Wait for filter B to be removed

[KEY] Press browser Forward button
[WAIT] Wait for filter B to be restored
[ASSERT] Verify filter B chip reappears
Assertions:
[STATE] Browser back removes the most recently applied filter
[STATE] Browser forward restores the filter

[STATE] URL params match chip state at each step
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on history navigation
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Back button removes all filters instead of just the last; chips not syncing with URL state after history navigation; console TypeError

Title: Range Facet - Non-Price Numeric Property Rendering (Volume_ml)
Preconditions: Category with numeric range property configured in Admin → Stores → Aggregation properties (e.g., Alcoholic Drinks with Volume_ml)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/alcoholic-drinks
[WAIT] Wait for category page and filter bar to load
[ASSERT] Locate Volume_(mL) range filter button in the filter bar
[ACT] Click the Volume_(mL) filter button to open the range dropdown
[WAIT] Wait for slider/range UI to appear
[ASSERT] Verify slider shows histogram chart with distribution buckets and min/max input fields (observed: min=9, max=550)
[ACT] Enter 200 in the min input field and press Enter (upper bound defaults to max)
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
Assertions:
[DOM] Volume_(mL) range filter button is visible in the filter bar
[DOM] Slider renders with histogram chart, dual slider handles, and min/max input fields
[DOM] After filtering, only products with Volume_ml >= 200 appear (observed: 8 results with values 200, 220, 330, 550)
[MATH] Product count matches the number of products within the selected range
[STATE] Filter chip appears — NOTE: chip currently shows truncated 'Volume' instead of 'Volume_ml' due to VP-9035 (expected to show full name after fix)
[DOM] Products with Volume_ml < 200 (e.g., Beck's 33ml, Bomonti 9ml) are NOT displayed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /graphql (products) returns HTTP 200 with filter=Volume_ml:200+TO+550
[NETWORK] Response totalCount matches displayed product count
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Filter chip shows truncated name 'Volume' instead of 'Volume_ml'; products outside range appearing (e.g., 33ml items visible); slider not rendering; range values corrupted in URL; console TypeError

Title: Range Facet - VP-9035 Regression: Underscore Field Name Preserved in Chip
Preconditions: Category page with underscore-named property range filter (e.g., Volume_ml in Alcoholic Drinks); VP-9035 fix deployed
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/alcoholic-drinks
[WAIT] Wait for filter bar to load
[ACT] Click Volume_(mL) range filter
[ACT] Enter 200 in the min input field and press Enter
[WAIT] Wait for filtered results
[ASSERT] Inspect the URL query parameters — verify contains 'Volume_ml' (not 'Volume')
[ASSERT] Inspect the filter chip text — verify full field name preserved
[ASSERT] Verify products at Volume_ml < 200 are excluded (Beck's 33ml, Bomonti 9ml)
Assertions:
[STATE] URL facets parameter contains 'Volume_ml' (not truncated to 'Volume')
[DOM] Filter chip shows 'Volume_ml: >= 200' or 'Volume_(mL): >= 200' (full field name preserved, not truncated at underscore)
[MATH] Result count matches actual products in range (~8 products observed with values 200, 220, 330, 550)
[DOM] Products with Volume_ml < 200 are excluded (Beck's, Bomonti, Efes Pilsener)
[STATE] No facets URL parameter corruption (no spurious [TO 311] or similar)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GraphQL request filter param contains 'Volume_ml' not 'Volume'
[NETWORK] Response aggregations match field name 'Volume_ml'
[NETWORK] No mismatched IsApplied states in aggregation response
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Filter chip shows 'Volume: ≤ 311' instead of 'Volume_ml: 200 – 550'; URL mutates to wrong facet range; 4 results instead of ~6; products at 33ml visible; GetFieldName splits on underscore

Title: Range Facet - Slider Min Greater Than Max Validation

Title: Range Facet - Combined with Term Facet (AND Logic)
Preconditions: Category page with both term facets (Brand) and range facets (Price) available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with multiple filter types on {{FRONT_URL}}

[ACT] Apply a term facet filter (e.g., select a Brand value)

[ACT] Apply a price range filter (e.g., $50–$200)
[WAIT] Wait for combined filtered results; note result count as Count_Combined
[ASSERT] Verify Count_Combined <= Count_Brand
[ASSERT] Verify all displayed products match both Brand AND price range
[ACT] Remove the price range chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify result count returns to Count_Brand
Assertions:
[MATH] Count_Combined <= Count_Brand (AND logic narrows results)
[DOM] All products after combined filter match the selected Brand AND fall within the price range
[STATE] Removing range filter restores the term-facet-only result count
[DOM] Both chips visible when both filters active
[STATE] Removing range chip preserves term facet chip
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /graphql returns results matching both filter and facet criteria
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Combined filter returning more results than single filter (OR instead of AND); products outside price range appearing with correct brand; removing range chip also removes brand chip; console TypeError

Title: Range Facet - Currency Switch Updates Price Range Values
Preconditions: Category page with price range filter; store supports multiple currencies (USD, EUR)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with price range filter on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] Wait for filter panel to load
[ASSERT] Note price range min/max values in default currency (USD)
[ACT] Switch currency to EUR using the currency selector
[WAIT] Wait for page to reload with new currency
[ASSERT] Verify price range filter min/max values updated to EUR amounts
[ACT] Apply a price range in EUR
[WAIT] Wait for filtered results
[ASSERT] Verify all product prices are displayed in EUR and fall within the selected range
Assertions:
[DOM] Price range filter bounds change after currency switch (not just symbol change — actual values from EUR price list)
[MATH] Range min/max in EUR differ from USD values (not exchange-rate converted)
[DOM] After range filter in EUR, all products show EUR prices within range
[STATE] No mixed-currency state in filter controls or product cards
[STATE] Product count may decrease significantly if few products have prices in the new currency — this is expected behavior (BL-PRICE-005)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /graphql uses currencyCode matching selected currency
[NETWORK] Filter parameter uses price.eur (not price.usd)
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Range values unchanged after currency switch; EUR products showing USD prices; mixed currencies in filter and product cards; filter parameter still using old currency; console TypeError

Title: Range Facet - Open-Ended Range: Up To Maximum
Preconditions: Category page with price range filter; products at various price points
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with price range filter on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] Wait for range filter to load
[ACT] Set range with only maximum value (e.g., up to $100 — leave min empty or at 0)
[ACT] Apply the filter
[WAIT] Wait for filtered results
[ASSERT] Verify all displayed products are priced at or below $100
[ASSERT] Verify products above $100 are excluded
Assertions:
[MATH] All displayed product prices <= $100
[DOM] No products with price > $100 visible
[DOM] Filter chip shows 'price: <= 100' (open-ended label with ≤ symbol)
[MATH] Product count matches actual products at or below $100
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GraphQL filter uses open-ended syntax [TO 100] in URL facets parameter
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Products above $100 appearing in results; filter chip showing wrong range; product count mismatch; console TypeError

Title: Range Facet - Open-Ended Range: From Minimum
Preconditions: Category page with price range filter; products at various price points
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page with price range filter on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] Wait for range filter to load
[ACT] Set range with only minimum value (e.g., from $100 — leave max empty or at max)
[ACT] Apply the filter
[WAIT] Wait for filtered results
[ASSERT] Verify all displayed products are priced at or above $100
[ASSERT] Verify products below $100 are excluded
Assertions:
[MATH] All displayed product prices >= $100
[DOM] No products with price < $100 visible
[DOM] Filter chip shows 'price: >= 100' (open-ended label with ≥ symbol)
[MATH] Product count matches actual products at or above $100
[STATE] Products at exactly $100 are included (boundary is inclusive)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GraphQL filter uses open-ended syntax [100 TO] in URL facets parameter
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Products below $100 appearing in results; filter chip showing wrong range; product count mismatch; console TypeError
